message:
feat(fcp-oauth): expand OAuth 1.0a/2.0 implementation with comprehensive tests

Complete OAuth module test coverage:

error.rs (+101 lines):
- Error type conversions: HTTP status mapping, provider-specific codes
- Error chain propagation: source, backtrace, Display/Debug formatting
- Rate limit error extraction: retry-after parsing, quota headers

lib.rs (+51 lines):
- Module re-export verification: all public types accessible
- Feature flag combinations: oauth1-only, oauth2-only, full
- Version compatibility: protocol version detection and negotiation

oauth1.rs (+80 lines):
- Signature base string construction: parameter encoding, URL normalization
- HMAC-SHA1/SHA256 signature generation and verification
- Nonce and timestamp generation: uniqueness, clock skew tolerance
- Two-legged vs three-legged auth flow state machines

oauth2.rs (+119 lines):
- Authorization code flow: redirect handling, state parameter validation
- Client credentials grant: scope merging, token caching
- Refresh token rotation: automatic refresh, expiry prediction
- JWT bearer assertion: claims construction, signature algorithms

pkce.rs (+49 lines):
- Code verifier generation: character set, length bounds (43-128)
- Code challenge derivation: S256 hash calculation, plain fallback
- Verifier/challenge matching: timing-safe comparison

provider.rs (+72 lines):
- Provider configuration: discovery document parsing, endpoint extraction
- Multi-provider registry: lookup by ID, default selection
- Provider-specific quirks: parameter naming differences, scope formats

token.rs (+148 lines):
- Token storage: secure memory handling, serialization safety
- Token refresh scheduling: expires_in handling, buffer time
- Access/refresh token separation: scope association, audience claims
- Token introspection: active status, scope verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
